ASR Federal Leather Bifold Minimalist Double ID Card Holder, Black Basketweave

Need a little help keeping your ID, credit cards or business cards organized, separated and protected? Look no further than the ASR Federal Black Leather Bi-fold Minimalist Wallet Double ID Card Holder. Although this type of bi-fold card holder is traditionally used as an ID card holder, it can be used for a variety of different card holder needs: business card holder, credit card holder, metro pass holder, student ID holder or international travelers ID card holder. The leather card holder can also function as a slim, minimalist bi-fold wallet if you’re looking to reduce the number of cards you carry on a daily basis.

The ASR Federal black leather bi-fold minimalist wallet card holder is also a great piece to have when you’re traveling and want to avoid the extra bulk of your regular wallet. Its slim, compact design, measuring just one inch in depth, is perfect for slipping into a purse, suitcase, backpack, jacket pocket or briefcase without taking up too much room, keeping your valuable ID cards safe and secure but still easily accessible. And notably, the bi-fold minimalist wallet card holder is a reliable and convenient carrying option for police or professionals in the private or public safety or security industries, as the card holder makes it fast and easy to display your ID when needed.

Key Features

  • ID CARD HOLDER: The ASR Federal black leather double sided ID credential card holder can be used for a variety of card holder needs: business card holder, credit card holder, ID card holder, metro pass holder or international travelers ID card holder. The double sided leather card holder can also function as a minimalist bifold wallet
  • SECURITY CREDENTIAL CARD HOLDER: This ID card holder is especially useful with two clear windows for easy visibility, the bifold credentials holder discreetly and securely stows ID while still remaining accessible
  • COMPACT DESIGN: Measuring just one inch in depth, the lightweight ID card holder easily slips into any pocket, backpack, suitcase or briefcase for convenient location and transport. The leather ID credential holder is also great for traveling whilst abroad
  • GENUINE LEATHER MATERIAL: Made in the USA, the ID card holder is constructed from 100% heavy gauge premium leather, making it a durable and long lasting product. Over time and with use, the ID card holder will relax and mold to your preferred carrying method without losing its structure
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.75 inches x 3.25 inches x 0.20 inch; Color: black; Country of Origin: USA; Weight: 1.92 ounces; Material: 100% genuine leather; Each ID slot fits cards up to 2.75 inches x 4.375 inches

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRTDIDH-83100-BW
  • UPC: 810131702946
  • Color: Black

Made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather, this bi-fold minimalist wallet card holder is crafted in the USA and features turned edges and rounded corners. Heavy gauge leather, while at first use might seem stiff, will soften and mold to your preferred carrying method with a little bit of time. The bi-fold minimalist wallet card holder also features two clear windows, so that ID or personal cards are easily visible but protected from scuffs and scratches when in use.

Whether you plan to use the ID card holder for work, travel or just as an everyday carry item, the durable, compact and multi-functional ASR Federal black leather bifold minimalist wallet double ID card holder will help keep your most important pieces of ID or other personal cards organized and easily accessible.

Each ID slot fits cards up to 2.75" x 4.375", so the card holder should fit most standard IDs. The overall dimensions of the ID card holder are 4.75" x 3.25" and is likely to fit in most pockets.
